scripts.test:external-feeds: cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../.. && node scripts/test_external_feeds.mjs
scripts.test:external-feeds:auto-threshold: cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../.. && EXTERNAL_FEED_TEST_AUTO_THRESHOLD=1 node scripts/test_external_feeds.mjs
scripts.test:threat-intel: cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../.. && node scripts/test_threat_intel_policy.mjs
scripts.test:smoke: cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../.. && node scripts/smoke_test.mjs
scripts.benchmark: cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../.. && node scripts/benchmark_analyzer.mjs
scripts.evaluate: cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../.. && node scripts/evaluate_dataset.mjs
scripts.tune:rules: cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../.. && node scripts/tune_rule_weights.mjs
